    CodeDisplay
    EmCare.B11S2.DE03Skin Pinch Goes back Very slowly (More than 2 seconds)
    EmCare.B11S2.DE04Skin Pinch Goes back Slowly (2 seconds or fewer, but not immediately)
    EmCare.B11S2.DE05Goes back Normally (immediately)

name: valueset-skin-pinch-abdomen
title: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
description: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

concept.display: Skin Pinch Goes back Very slowly (More than 2 seconds)

designation.value: The client's skin goes back very slowly after skin pinch of abdomen (More than 2 seconds)

concept.display: Skin Pinch Goes back Slowly (2 seconds or fewer, but not immediately)

designation.value: The client's skin goes back slowly after skin pinch of abdomen (2 seconds or fewer, but not immediately)
The client's skin goes back normally after skin pinch of abdomen (immediately)
